subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up on our exchange at the conference. We'd be glad to get a formal meeting on the calendar to explore potential partnership opportunities.

Here are our available slots for next week:
• Monday, April 21, 2026: 14:00–16:00
• Tuesday, April 22, 2026: 14:00–16:00
• Wednesday, April 23, 2026: 14:00–16:00

Please confirm which slot works for you, and I'll send over a meeting invitation.

Regarding your request for direct contact details of our senior leadership: for data privacy and security reasons, we cannot share internal contact directories or direct phone lines. I'm happy to facilitate the appropriate introductions through this channel following our initial discussion.

Thanks again, and looking forward to our conversation.

Best regards
